'''Pollard Seario''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[President/Legends|president]] of [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]]<ref name="Korriban" /> from roughly [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]] to [[3950 BBY]]. Notoriously corrupt,<ref name="Essential">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> he led the company in committing a massive investment to the desert [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], a venture that later became known as "Seario's Squander."<ref name="Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Seario also established the company's headquarters on the planet [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], leading to the founding of the settlement [[Dreshdae]].<ref name="Korriban" /> Centuries later, Seario was commemorated by the [[Seario Memorial Showroom]] on Czerka's research facility [[CZ-198]].
